input.user_input: What is the auto-renewal language in this SaaS subscription agreement, and how much notice is needed to cancel?

actual: I do not see a document attached to your request. Please upload or paste the text of the SaaS subscription agreement, and I will be happy to review it to find the auto-renewal language and the required cancellation notice period for you.
